evidence.text: This is where many postmortems quietly fail. They document the fix but ignore the organizational impact. Shame does not disappear when the service recovers. It lingers in future decision-making, risk tolerance, and silence.

title: Closing the Long Loop: What Nick Rockwell Taught Me About Resilience
